DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ruben Sislyan, Esq. 310-586-7700 Greenberg Traurig LLP for Plaintiff (via Zoom).
Julie Wilensky, Esq. 415-554-4274 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.
Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com.

Argued. Ms. Wilensky informs the Court they do not contest the 5th cause of action. Mr. Sisylan contests the tentative ruling in regard to the 6th and 7th causes of action. After full argument from both sides. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Taken Under Submission.

The Court instructs both sides to prepare a proposed order for the Court and for opposing counsel's review.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported. (501)
